t.EN: Thermally decomposes biomass into solid carbon (biochar) and gaseous CO2. The reactor handles both stages on its own — crew operate the pyrolysis itself, and the residual char vents to atmosphere automatically. Closes the food/fertilizer loop by feeding the Chemical Refinery with carbon without needing combat-sourced Rot.
Partially carbonized biomass exhaust waiting to be vented as CO2. Produced as a byproduct of pyrolysis. The reactor automatically vents it to atmosphere when in storage.
